name: Keeper Single Target
description: Burst-focused ST build. Force of Nature treants provide 24% damage amp. Plan cooldowns around 1-minute burst windows. Incarnation for longer, safer burst. Eclipse timing syncs with Starlord refresh.

priority: Maintain Moonfire and Sunfire
Force of Nature with Eclipse or CA active
Fury of Elune aligned with Eclipse or Force of Nature
Celestial Alignment if charge ready before Convoke
Enter Solar Eclipse when Starlord falls off + have free Starsurge procs
Spend Starweaver/Touch the Cosmos procs on Starfall if no Ascendant Eclipse stacks
Starsurge to prevent AP overcap or consume Ascendant Eclipse stacks
Wrath as filler
cooldowns: Incarnation: overlap with Force of Nature for maximum burst
Force of Nature: every 1 minute, always during Eclipse
Potion of Recklessness: on pull (pre-pot) and during strongest CD window

notes: Keeper demands strategic CD planning. Research fight lengths and damage amp phases to determine CD efficiency. Hold Force of Nature to overlap Harmony of the Grove with other CDs.

name: Elune's Chosen Multi-Target
description: Stacked cleave beast. Lunar Calling means you always cast Starfire. Fury of Elune applies Atmospheric Exposure for 4% damage amp on all targets. Highest simming for sustained multi-target.

opener: Incarnation (outside Eclipse, when Fury of Elune available)
priority: Moonfire every target
Sunfire
Starfall on 2+ targets to prevent AP overcap
Starweaver/Touch the Cosmos procs on Starfall
Starsurge on single target only near AP cap
Starfire as primary filler (reduces Fury of Elune CD via Lunation)
Fury of Elune on cooldown
cooldowns: Incarnation when Fury of Elune is available
Fury of Elune on cooldown, always during Eclipse or Incarnation

notes: You will NOT enter Solar Eclipse with Elune's Chosen due to Lunar Calling. Always Lunar. Maximize casting uptime to reduce Fury of Elune CD via Lunation.

name: Elune's Chosen M+
description: Sustained AoE throughput build. Uncapped Starfall + Starfire damage scales infinitely with pull size. Pool AP between packs. Fury of Elune + Atmospheric Exposure for permanent AoE amp.

priority: Pool AP between packs (80+ minimum)
Sunfire on pull start
Moonfire priority targets
Starfall on 2+ targets
Fury of Elune on cooldown
Starfire filler (uncapped AoE + Lunation CD reduction)
Starsurge on 1 target or to prevent AP overcap
cooldowns: Use CDs on trash, not just bosses. Treat dungeon as one long fight.
Solar Beam every caster pack (1-min CD)

notes: Pool AP. Use CDs liberally. Solar Beam every caster pack. Stampeding Roar for the group. Elune's caps higher than Keeper on large pulls.

name: Keeper PvP Burst
description: Burst-focused PvP build. Force of Nature + Incarnation kill windows every 1-3 minutes. Cyclone chains on healer. Shadowmeld for resets.

opener: Incarnation during teammate stun on healer
priority: Maintain DoTs on all targets (pressure + Shooting Stars)
Solar Beam enemy healer on cast
Cyclone healer during kill attempts
Starsurge when AP available
Bear Form when being trained by melee
Typhoon melee off you
cooldowns: Force of Nature every 1 minute for kill windows
Incarnation every 3 minutes for major burst

notes: Versatility is king for PvP. Survivability wins games. Shadowmeld to dodge CC and reset positioning.
source: Icy Veins PvP guide + Skill-Capped Midnight 12.0.1

name: Keeper Learning Build
description: Simplified build for learning Balance Druid. Fewer cooldowns to manage. Incarnation for straightforward burst. Focus on Eclipse management and DoT uptime before optimizing further.

priority: Keep Moonfire and Sunfire up at all times
Enter Eclipse whenever you have charges
Starsurge at 40+ AP (single target)
Starfall at 50+ AP (2+ targets)
Wrath as filler in Solar Eclipse
Starfire as filler on 2+ targets
Incarnation on cooldown
cooldowns: Incarnation on cooldown (don't overthink timing yet)

notes: Master three things first: 1) Keep DoTs up. 2) Don't overcap AP. 3) Use Eclipse charges, don't sit on 2. Once these are automatic, move to the Advanced builds.
source: Adapted from Method/Icy Veins for learning
